case_title: GONZALEZ, JOSE A. VS EUGENE BURGER MANAGEMENT CORP.

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS DISPOSITION AUG-28-2007, CONTINUANCE ORDERED PER REQUEST TO OCT-24-2007 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
EXHIBITS FROM EXHIBIT REPORT DATED MAY-29-2014 ORDERED DESTROYED
PLTF'S REQUEST FOR POSTPONEMENT WA SUBMITTED WITH ORDER FOR COMMISSIONER'S APPROVAL. $10.00 FEE PAID.
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $5,000.00 FILED BY GONZALEZ, JOSE A. AS TO DEFENDANT EUGENE BURGER MANAGEMENT CORP. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR AUG-28-2007 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED SIGNED SENT TO DEFT.
PLTF FILED AN AMENDED CLAIM AS TO PARTY DEFT. ADDED 5810-5816-5818 AS DEFT.
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF OCT-24-2007 - JUDGMENT. COMM PAUL SLAVIT; F. RAYRAY, CLERK. NOT REPORTED IN (506)

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF GONZALEZ, JOSE A. IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT 5810-5818 MISSION STREET OWNERS'S ASSOCIATION DEFENDANT EUGENE BERGER MANAGEMENT CORP, DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE. THE JUDGMENT IS WITHOUT PREJUDICE TO ANY CLAIM PLAINTIFF MAY HAVE AGAINST HIS LANDLORD FOR ADDITIONAL COMPENSATION. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL
COPIES OF CONTINUANCE DATE SENT TO ALL PARTIES.
SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF OCT-24-2007 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF OCT-24-2007 BY PAUL SLAVIT
NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT SENT TO DEFENDANT 5810-5818 MISSION STREET OWNERS'S ASSOCIATION, RETURNED "ATTEMPTED NOT KNOWN/UNABLE TO FORWARD".
